summary_one_line: An empty (zero-length) entity/string reaching xmlStringDecodeEntitiesInt so str==last on entry and the str<last test is false.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A structurally well-formed DTD document (<?xml ?> + <!DOCTYPE a SYSTEM "dtds/127772.dtd"> + element/attribute body) that drives the parser deep enough to call xmlStringDecodeEntitiesInt with a zero-length string (str==last), so the line-2650 `if (str < last)` test takes its false branch and falls into `c = 0` at line 2653.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds are grimoire-discovered and carry intact XML/DTD scaffolding -- `<?xml version="1.0"?>`, `<!DOCTYPEa SYSTEM "dtds/127772.dtd">`, `<a><b ...="">` -- produced by GrimoireRecursiveReplacementMutator splicing generalized token/gap structure; an empty attribute value (`=""`) yields a zero-length decode string so str==last and the false (else) branch executes. The winner hits the function 44 times vs the loser's 9 and exercises the false side (line 2650 W: T=6 F=38) where the loser never does (L: T=9 F=0).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: The cmplog loser-blocking seeds reach xmlStringDecodeEntitiesInt only 9 times and every entry has a non-empty decode string, so str<last is always true (line 2650 L: T=9 F=0, never F). cmplog's byte-level havoc + I2S substitution mutates DTD/path literals (e.g. the `127772.xml`/`.dsd` filename bytes) but does not assemble the structural arrangement that produces an empty entity body reaching this function.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire's GeneralizationStage + Grimoire structural mutators (GrimoireRecursiveReplacementMutator etc.) recombine generalized XML/DTD token structure to construct documents that drive an empty string into the entity decoder; cmplog shares I2S with grimoire, so the single-technique delta is the structural/grammar-free recombination, not comparison-solving.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the false side of `if (str < last)` in xmlStringDecodeEntitiesInt, taken when str==last (empty decode string).
The winner takes the else/false branch (c = 0) which the loser never reaches.
The decisive pair is grimoire>cmplog with the grimoire_structural technique delta.
Winner resolved 10/10 while loser blocked 9/10 at this branch.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
winner: resolved=10/10  blocked=0  unreached=0
  loser:  resolved=1/10  blocked=9  unreached=0

evidence_trail.claim: All winner-resolving seeds are grimoire seeds built by GrimoireRecursiveReplacementMutator.
Winner seeds carry well-formed DTD scaffolding with an empty attribute value.
Winner seed 1 contains an empty attribute value pattern.
At line 2650 the winner exercises the false side while the loser never does.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: L2650  T=6 F=38  T=9 F=0  if (str < last)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The winner invokes the enclosing function far more often than the loser.
grimoire's single-technique delta vs cmplog is generalization plus Grimoire structural mutators, both already share I2S.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The single-technique delta is therefore
`grimoire` vs `cmplog` (both have I2S; grimoire adds generalization +
Grimoire mutators), not vs naive.

evidence_trail.claim: Grimoire mutators splice/recurse on generalized token/gap structures, a string-based grammar-free structural mutation.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
splice and recurse on these generalised token/gap structures
(string-based, grammar-free structural mutation)

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: claimed_mechanism is grimoire structural, not I2SRandReplace, so the mandatory I2S lineage check does not apply. Both grimoire and cmplog already run I2SRandReplace, so an I2S-floor dash row could not distinguish the pair; and grimoire wraps all stages in LineageMutatorWrap with no per-operator names (all rows render mutation_op = -), so lineage names cannot separate structural from I2S finds here. The winner seeds' mutation_op fields directly name the Grimoire structural mutators (GrimoireRecursiveReplacementMutator / GrimoireRandomDeleteMutator), which is the operative evidence.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only path into xmlStringDecodeEntitiesInt requires a non-empty decode string (str<last always true), yet grimoire still resolves the line-2650 false branch significantly more than cmplog -- showing the divergence is not driven by structurally reaching an empty entity string.

weakest_evidence_point: The causal link from a grimoire-spliced empty attribute value (="") to a zero-length string entering this specific decoder is inferred from source + seed bytes, not directly traced through the call chain.
